questions.question: What is the TypeScript type of `event.target` in a standard `Event` handler?
Which TypeScript type should you use for a `@keydown` event handler?
What is the difference between `event.target` and `event.currentTarget`?
options: They are aliases for the same element
`target` is the element the listener is on; `currentTarget` is the clicked element
`target` is the actual element clicked; `currentTarget` is the element the listener is on
`currentTarget` is only available on keyboard events
